events.content: [{"role": "question", "text": "Chris O'Call [3732]: Great. Thanks and congratulations on a great start to the year.", "speaker": "Chris O'Call", "title": "Analyst at Stiefel"}, {"role": "answer", "text": "Cindy Olson [3735]: Yeah, thank you.", "speaker": "Cindy Olson", "title": "Head of Investor Relations and Strategy"}, {"role": "answer", "text": "Brian Nickell [3747]: Okay, thank you. And thanks, everybody, for the questions. Obviously, I appreciate the kind words of recognizing how we're off to a great start. Very proud of the momentum that the business has and really proud of what our operators are doing in our restaurants. I mentioned it in my prepared remarks, but it was so much fun to be at our AMC with all of our restaurant general managers, apprentices, field leaders, team directors, regional vice presidents, talking about the business. Everybody was clearly aligned on what the task needs to be at hand, which is great culinary, developing great people, great culture, great teams, right? And then ultimately getting great throughput for our customers. And I think you're seeing the power of focus, the power of alignment, and the power, frankly, of Chipotle's culture and great people in these results in the last quarter. Optimistic about where we go from here. It's exciting to think about how we can double this business, going from 3,400, 3,500 restaurants to 7,000 restaurants, getting to 4 million average unit volumes, and then continue to make great progress on throughput. And surrounding this brand, I think, with great digital, great marketing, it's really an exciting moment for the brand. the company and uh you know we're just getting started which is which is really makes us a lot of fun so thanks for taking the time it's great to see the business respond with transactions driving the comp and uh you know we're going to stay focused on what we know works so we'll talk to you guys in a couple months thanks everybody the conference has now concluded thank you for attending today's presentation you may now disconnect", "speaker": "Brian Nickell", "title": "Chairman and Chief Executive Officer"}]
